category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison.

title.en: China-to-Vietnam EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入越南：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入越南：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against Vietnam TCVN / IEC charging-equipment standards, MOIT and EVN charging-station expectations, connector compatibility, OCPP interoperability, EMC / RCD safety evidence, and China GB/T 18487 baseline gaps.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与越南 TCVN / IEC 充电设备标准、MOIT 和 EVN 充电站要求、连接器兼容性、OCPP 互操作、EMC / RCD 安全证据及中国 GB/T 18487 基线差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與越南 TCVN / IEC 充電設備標準、MOIT 和 EVN 充電站要求、連接器相容性、OCPP 互操作、EMC / RCD 安全證據及中國 GB/T 18487 基線差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, TCVN scope determination, MOIT business or licensing assessment, EVN grid-connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, operators, designers, and installers should verify current Vietnamese standards, electricity, construction, fire-safety, metering, cybersecurity, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、TCVN适用范围裁定、MOIT经营或许可评审、EVN并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、运营方、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核实现行越南标准、电力、建设、消防安全、计量、网络安全及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、TCVN適用範圍裁定、MOIT經營或許可評審、EVN併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、營運方、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行越南標準、電力、建設、消防安全、計量、網絡安全及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Vietnam, the main practical gaps are TCVN / IEC 61851 evidence, GB/T 20234-to-Type 2 or CCS2 connector redesign where the project specifies IEC connectors, MOIT and EVN charging-station and grid processes, OCPP backend interoperability where required by the operator, and IEC-family EMC / RCD safety evidence. Do not assume a blanket mandatory whole-unit Vietnam charger certificate without checking the exact charger type, installation route, and current regulator list.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造充电桩进入越南时，主要实际差距包括 TCVN / IEC 61851 证据、项目指定 IEC 接口时从 GB/T 20234 改为 Type 2 或 CCS2 的连接器重新设计、MOIT 与 EVN 充电站及电网流程、运营方要求时的 OCPP 后台互操作，以及 IEC 体系 EMC / RCD 安全证据。不得在未核实具体充电桩类型、安装路径和现行监管目录前，假设存在统一强制整机越南充电桩证书。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造充電樁進入越南時，主要實際差距包括 TCVN / IEC 61851 證據、項目指定 IEC 介面時從 GB/T 20234 改為 Type 2 或 CCS2 的連接器重新設計、MOIT 與 EVN 充電站及電網流程、營運方要求時的 OCPP 後台互操作，以及 IEC 體系 EMC / RCD 安全證據。不得在未核實具體充電樁類型、安裝路徑和現行監管目錄前，假設存在統一強制整機越南充電樁證書。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, government gazette, utility, conformity assessment body, customs authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
